---
title: "Bella Legal Terminology Study"
title-block: false
navbar: false
sidebar: false
search: false
bread-crumbs: false
page-navigation: false
repo-actions: false
resources:
  - bella.css
  - bella.js
  - bella-data.js
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    css: bella.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
        <script>
          window.QuartoPreview = window.QuartoPreview || { init: function () {} };
        </script>
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="bella-data.js"></script>
          <script src="bella.js"></script>
---

<div class="bella-app" id="bella-app">
<noscript>
<div class="bella-shell">
<p class="bella-noscript">This study page needs JavaScript enabled to run the flashcards.</p>
</div>
</noscript>
</div>
